original: ["The young alien huntress jabs at you with her spear, forcing you to leap out of the way. “Hey, this may be my first time, but I’m not that easy!” she exclaims.","The virgin huntress quirks her head, clearly baffled by your actions. It seems you utterly failed to entice her....","The alien huntress fans her face with a webbed hand and moves closer to you. “Oooh, I think I’m getting the vapors... psyche!”"]
